overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval fantasy classroom or study hall with gothic vaulted ceilings, featuring students seated at long wooden desks. Natural light streams through tall windows at the far end, illuminating the stone interior. The scene appears to be from a high-quality game engine render with no camera movement.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval gothic study hall with high vaulted ceilings and natural light streaming through tall arched windows. Students sit at long wooden desks on either side of a central blue rug, reading and writing. The room features stone walls, wooden bookshelves, and an ornate chandelier, creating a scholarly atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a medieval gothic study hall that maintains a serene and scholarly atmosphere. It begins with a wide perspective of the room, where natural light streams through tall arched windows to illuminate the stone walls and high vaulted ceilings. The gaze settles on students seated at long wooden desks on either side of a central blue rug, focused on reading and writing. The scene remains poised, highlighting the interplay between the ornate chandelier and the surrounding wooden bookshelves.
